text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is injured, so I bring her to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Every part of my body is killing me! Unbelievable!
How's this even possible?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aghhh... Here. Wait, no, the other SIIIDE!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can't handle it anymore! I'd rather just tear off
the scab and be done with it!
choice_data_list: It's all right. I'm here for you.
It's all right. I'm here for you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can't handle it anymore! I'd rather just tear off
the scab and be done with it!
choice_data_list: It's all right. I'm here for you.
It's all right. I'm here for you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Can you buy me ice cream, then?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll also need some manga and video
games to pass the time while I recover... Oh,
and—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but only if I don't get bored! Who knows
what antics I'll get into if I do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship makes a full recovery after getting
some rest, but my wallet has to be sent to
intensive care.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Show the pain who's boss?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, that sounds fun! Okay, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Let me just focus on my target and... Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aw, yeah! I sent that pain packin'!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: YEOWWWCH!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Dagnabbit! It ricocheted off the wall and hit me
back twice as hard! Make it stop, make it stooop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship writhes in pain for a few minutes, then
goes limp as a rag doll.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Welp, the pain is gone, but that doesn't mean I'm
good as new.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But no point griping! We have to come up with a
safer training regimen. Not just for my sake, but
for the sake of my intergalactic fans!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, of course you're helping! How else are my
fans going to sleep at night if we don't let them
know all hands are on deck?
choice_data_list:
Well, should we start revamping your training,
then?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know it! I already have a slogan ready! It's
gonna be, "Safety first! Safe training that's safer
than safe!"

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh, that sounds tacky. There's gotta be
something better...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some trial and error, we manage to put
together a new training regimen for Gold Ship.
